text:
- Update to 0.6.5
- Add Sybase support
- Use databases/py-sqlite3 for Python version 2.5 and above

Distfiles are different on SourceForge and CheeseShop (contents are the same),
here use CheeseShop one and (temporary) remove SF in MASTER_SITES
